Testregel 2.4.2 (2.4.2 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Page is missing h1 heading

<body class="CorporateStartPage" data-last-modified="19.01.2026 10:39:25"> <svg height="0" style="display:none;" width="0" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"
Add a single h1 heading that describes the page content
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (7 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="languageselector__headline">Land</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 class="project-resource-block__title">Vannkraft</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 class="socialmediablock-footer__title">Følg oss </h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link text has redundant phrase: 'External link to intranet'

<a aria-label="Go to Twitter" class="socialmediablock-footer__icon twitter" href="https://twitter.com/Statkraft" target="_blank"> <span> <svg height="22" width="22"> <use height="22" href="#twitter" w
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Go to LinkedIn'

Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<div class="navbar" role="navigation"> <div class="navbar__left navbar__left--flex"> <button aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Meny" class="navbar__toggle hamburger hamburger--spin"> <span class="hamb
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<nav class="navigation__container" role="navigation"> <ul class="navigation__list"> <li class="navigation__item"> <a aria-label="Takes you to the Hjem page via the menu" class="navigation__link" href=
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

<svg height="22" width="22"> <use height="22" href="#instagram" width="22"></use> </svg>
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg height="22" width="22"> <use height="22" href="#youtube" width="22"></use> </svg>
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (6 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="languageselector__headline">Land</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 class="socialmediablock-footer__title">Følg oss </h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="navigation__container" role="navigation"> <ul class="navigation__list"> <li class="navigation__item"> <a aria-label="Takes you to the Hjem page via the menu" class="navigation__link" href=
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<div class="navbar" role="navigation"> <div class="navbar__left navbar__left--flex"> <button aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Meny" class="navbar__toggle hamburger hamburger--spin"> <span class="hamb
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="navigation__container" role="navigation"> <ul class="navigation__list"> <li class="navigation__item"> <a aria-label="Takes you to the Hjem page via the menu" class="navigation__link" href=
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (19 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'External link to intranet'

<a aria-label="External link to intranet" class="navigation__link--sunset customer-login" href="/customer-login/" rel="noopener" target="_blank"> <span class="customer-login__icon"> <svg height="20" w
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a aria-label="External link to intranet" class="navigation__link--sunset customer-login" href="/customer-login/" rel="noopener" target="_blank"> <span class="customer-login__icon"> <svg height="20" w
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (6 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe aria-hidden="true" height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-TQKHWV" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<div class="navbar" role="navigation"> <div class="navbar__left navbar__left--flex"> <button aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Meny" class="navbar__toggle hamburger hamburger--spin"> <span class="hamb
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<nav class="navigation__container" role="navigation"> <ul class="navigation__list"> <li class="navigation__item"> <a aria-label="Takes you to the Hjem page via the menu" class="navigation__link" href=
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<input aria-label="Søk" class="search__input" name="query" placeholder="Søk" type="search"/>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<button aria-label="Søk" class="search__submit" type="submit"> <svg height="20" width="20"> <use height="20" href="#magnifier" width="20"></use> </svg> </button>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<button class="search__close" id="searchClose" type="button"> <svg height="20" width="20"> <use height="20" href="#x" width="20"></use> </svg> </button>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (7 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="languageselector__headline">Land</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="contact-card__name">Alexandra Bech Gjørv</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 class="socialmediablock-footer__title">Følg oss </h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="navigation__container" role="navigation"> <ul class="navigation__list"> <li class="navigation__item"> <a aria-label="Takes you to the Hjem page via the menu" class="navigation__link" href=
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<div class="navbar" role="navigation"> <div class="navbar__left navbar__left--flex"> <button aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Meny" class="navbar__toggle hamburger hamburger--spin"> <span class="hamb
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="navigation__container" role="navigation"> <ul class="navigation__list"> <li class="navigation__item"> <a aria-label="Takes you to the Hjem page via the menu" class="navigation__link" href=
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (18 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'External link to intranet'

<a aria-label="External link to intranet" class="navigation__link--sunset customer-login" href="/customer-login/" rel="noopener" target="_blank"> <span class="customer-login__icon"> <svg height="20" w
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a aria-label="External link to intranet" class="navigation__link--sunset customer-login" href="/customer-login/" rel="noopener" target="_blank"> <span class="customer-login__icon"> <svg height="20" w
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="languageselector__external-link" href="https://www.statkraftvarme.no/" target="_blank"> <span class="languageselector__text">Statkraft Varme (NO)</span> <span class="languageselector__launch
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)

4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (6 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe aria-hidden="true" height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-TQKHWV" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<div class="navbar" role="navigation"> <div class="navbar__left navbar__left--flex"> <button aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Meny" class="navbar__toggle hamburger hamburger--spin"> <span class="hamb
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<nav class="navigation__container" role="navigation"> <ul class="navigation__list"> <li class="navigation__item"> <a aria-label="Takes you to the Hjem page via the menu" class="navigation__link" href=
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<input aria-label="Søk" class="search__input" name="query" placeholder="Søk" type="search"/>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<button aria-label="Søk" class="search__submit" type="submit"> <svg height="20" width="20"> <use height="20" href="#magnifier" width="20"></use> </svg> </button>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<button class="search__close" id="searchClose" type="button"> <svg height="20" width="20"> <use height="20" href="#x" width="20"></use> </svg> </button>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (7 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="languageselector__headline">Land</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="featured-content-block__title"> Nøkkeltall </h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 class="socialmediablock-footer__title">Følg oss </h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="navigation__container" role="navigation"> <ul class="navigation__list"> <li class="navigation__item"> <a aria-label="Takes you to the Hjem page via the menu" class="navigation__link" href=
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<div class="navbar" role="navigation"> <div class="navbar__left navbar__left--flex"> <button aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Meny" class="navbar__toggle hamburger hamburger--spin"> <span class="hamb
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="navigation__container" role="navigation"> <ul class="navigation__list"> <li class="navigation__item"> <a aria-label="Takes you to the Hjem page via the menu" class="navigation__link" href=
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (18 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'External link to intranet'

<a aria-label="External link to intranet" class="navigation__link--sunset customer-login" href="/customer-login/" rel="noopener" target="_blank"> <span class="customer-login__icon"> <svg height="20" w
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a aria-label="External link to intranet" class="navigation__link--sunset customer-login" href="/customer-login/" rel="noopener" target="_blank"> <span class="customer-login__icon"> <svg height="20" w
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (6 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe aria-hidden="true" height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-TQKHWV" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<div class="navbar" role="navigation"> <div class="navbar__left navbar__left--flex"> <button aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Meny" class="navbar__toggle hamburger hamburger--spin"> <span class="hamb
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<nav class="navigation__container" role="navigation"> <ul class="navigation__list"> <li class="navigation__item"> <a aria-label="Takes you to the Hjem page via the menu" class="navigation__link" href=
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<input aria-label="Søk" class="search__input" name="query" placeholder="Søk" type="search"/>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<button aria-label="Søk" class="search__submit" type="submit"> <svg height="20" width="20"> <use height="20" href="#magnifier" width="20"></use> </svg> </button>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<button class="search__close" id="searchClose" type="button"> <svg height="20" width="20"> <use height="20" href="#x" width="20"></use> </svg> </button>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (7 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="languageselector__headline">Land</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="featured-content-block__title"> Nøkkelfakta </h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 class="socialmediablock-footer__title">Følg oss </h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="navigation__container" role="navigation"> <ul class="navigation__list"> <li class="navigation__item"> <a aria-label="Takes you to the Hjem page via the menu" class="navigation__link" href=
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<div class="navbar" role="navigation"> <div class="navbar__left navbar__left--flex"> <button aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Meny" class="navbar__toggle hamburger hamburger--spin"> <span class="hamb
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="navigation__container" role="navigation"> <ul class="navigation__list"> <li class="navigation__item"> <a aria-label="Takes you to the Hjem page via the menu" class="navigation__link" href=
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (19 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'External link to intranet'

<a aria-label="External link to intranet" class="navigation__link--sunset customer-login" href="/customer-login/" rel="noopener" target="_blank"> <span class="customer-login__icon"> <svg height="20" w
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a aria-label="External link to intranet" class="navigation__link--sunset customer-login" href="/customer-login/" rel="noopener" target="_blank"> <span class="customer-login__icon"> <svg height="20" w
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (6 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe aria-hidden="true" height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-TQKHWV" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<div class="navbar" role="navigation"> <div class="navbar__left navbar__left--flex"> <button aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Meny" class="navbar__toggle hamburger hamburger--spin"> <span class="hamb
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<nav class="navigation__container" role="navigation"> <ul class="navigation__list"> <li class="navigation__item"> <a aria-label="Takes you to the Hjem page via the menu" class="navigation__link" href=
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<input aria-label="Søk" class="search__input" name="query" placeholder="Søk" type="search"/>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden

SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden

SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<button class="search__close" id="searchClose" type="button"> <svg height="20" width="20"> <use height="20" href="#x" width="20"></use> </svg> </button>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (6 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="languageselector__headline">Land</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 class="socialmediablock-footer__title">Følg oss </h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="navigation__container" role="navigation"> <ul class="navigation__list"> <li class="navigation__item"> <a aria-label="Takes you to the Hjem page via the menu" class="navigation__link" href=
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<div class="navbar" role="navigation"> <div class="navbar__left navbar__left--flex"> <button aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Meny" class="navbar__toggle hamburger hamburger--spin"> <span class="hamb
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="navigation__container" role="navigation"> <ul class="navigation__list"> <li class="navigation__item"> <a aria-label="Takes you to the Hjem page via the menu" class="navigation__link" href=
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (18 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'External link to intranet'

<a aria-label="External link to intranet" class="navigation__link--sunset customer-login" href="/customer-login/" rel="noopener" target="_blank"> <span class="customer-login__icon"> <svg height="20" w
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a aria-label="External link to intranet" class="navigation__link--sunset customer-login" href="/customer-login/" rel="noopener" target="_blank"> <span class="customer-login__icon"> <svg height="20" w
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

<body>

4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (6 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe aria-hidden="true" height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-TQKHWV" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<div class="navbar" role="navigation"> <div class="navbar__left navbar__left--flex"> <button aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Meny" class="navbar__toggle hamburger hamburger--spin"> <span class="hamb
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<nav class="navigation__container" role="navigation"> <ul class="navigation__list"> <li class="navigation__item"> <a aria-label="Takes you to the Hjem page via the menu" class="navigation__link" href=
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<input aria-label="Søk" class="search__input" name="query" placeholder="Søk" type="search"/>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<button aria-label="Søk" class="search__submit" type="submit"> <svg height="20" width="20"> <use height="20" href="#magnifier" width="20"></use> </svg> </button>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden

SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<button class="search__close" id="searchClose" type="button"> <svg height="20" width="20"> <use height="20" href="#x" width="20"></use> </svg> </button>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden

SERIOUS

Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (7 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="languageselector__headline">Land</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="featured-content-block__title"> Vår aktivitet </h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 class="socialmediablock-footer__title">Følg oss </h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="navigation__container" role="navigation"> <ul class="navigation__list"> <li class="navigation__item"> <a aria-label="Takes you to the Hjem page via the menu" class="navigation__link" href=
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<div class="navbar" role="navigation"> <div class="navbar__left navbar__left--flex"> <button aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Meny" class="navbar__toggle hamburger hamburger--spin"> <span class="hamb
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="navigation__container" role="navigation"> <ul class="navigation__list"> <li class="navigation__item"> <a aria-label="Takes you to the Hjem page via the menu" class="navigation__link" href=
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (18 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'External link to intranet'

<a aria-label="External link to intranet" class="navigation__link--sunset customer-login" href="/customer-login/" rel="noopener" target="_blank"> <span class="customer-login__icon"> <svg height="20" w
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a aria-label="External link to intranet" class="navigation__link--sunset customer-login" href="/customer-login/" rel="noopener" target="_blank"> <span class="customer-login__icon"> <svg height="20" w
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="languageselector__external-link" href="https://www.statkraftvarme.no/" target="_blank"> <span class="languageselector__text">Statkraft Varme (NO)</span> <span class="languageselector__launch
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (6 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe aria-hidden="true" height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-TQKHWV" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<div class="navbar" role="navigation"> <div class="navbar__left navbar__left--flex"> <button aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Meny" class="navbar__toggle hamburger hamburger--spin"> <span class="hamb
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<nav class="navigation__container" role="navigation"> <ul class="navigation__list"> <li class="navigation__item"> <a aria-label="Takes you to the Hjem page via the menu" class="navigation__link" href=
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<input aria-label="Søk" class="search__input" name="query" placeholder="Søk" type="search"/>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<button aria-label="Søk" class="search__submit" type="submit"> <svg height="20" width="20"> <use height="20" href="#magnifier" width="20"></use> </svg> </button>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<button class="search__close" id="searchClose" type="button"> <svg height="20" width="20"> <use height="20" href="#x" width="20"></use> </svg> </button>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (6 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="languageselector__headline">Land</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 class="socialmediablock-footer__title">Følg oss </h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="navigation__container" role="navigation"> <ul class="navigation__list"> <li class="navigation__item"> <a aria-label="Takes you to the Hjem page via the menu" class="navigation__link" href=
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<div class="navbar" role="navigation"> <div class="navbar__left navbar__left--flex"> <button aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Meny" class="navbar__toggle hamburger hamburger--spin"> <span class="hamb
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="navigation__container" role="navigation"> <ul class="navigation__list"> <li class="navigation__item"> <a aria-label="Takes you to the Hjem page via the menu" class="navigation__link" href=
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (19 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'External link to intranet'

<a aria-label="External link to intranet" class="navigation__link--sunset customer-login" href="/customer-login/" rel="noopener" target="_blank"> <span class="customer-login__icon"> <svg height="20" w
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a aria-label="External link to intranet" class="navigation__link--sunset customer-login" href="/customer-login/" rel="noopener" target="_blank"> <span class="customer-login__icon"> <svg height="20" w
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a aria-label="Go to YouTube" class="socialmediablock-footer__icon youtube" href="https://www.youtube.com/user/StatkraftChannel" target="_blank"> <span> <svg height="22" width="22"> <use height="22" h
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
4.1.1 Parsing (4 avvik)

SERIOUS

id="11"
Each ID must be unique on the page

SERIOUS

id="10"

SERIOUS

SERIOUS

4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (7 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe aria-hidden="true" height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-TQKHWV" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe allowfullscreen="allowfullscreen" height="360" src="https://player.vimeo.com/video/275781320?title=0&byline=0&portrait=0&color=8dc7dc" style="width: 640px; height: 360px;" width="6
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<div class="navbar" role="navigation"> <div class="navbar__left navbar__left--flex"> <button aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Meny" class="navbar__toggle hamburger hamburger--spin"> <span class="hamb
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<nav class="navigation__container" role="navigation"> <ul class="navigation__list"> <li class="navigation__item"> <a aria-label="Takes you to the Hjem page via the menu" class="navigation__link" href=
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<input aria-label="Søk" class="search__input" name="query" placeholder="Søk" type="search"/>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<button aria-label="Søk" class="search__submit" type="submit"> <svg height="20" width="20"> <use height="20" href="#magnifier" width="20"></use> </svg> </button>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<button class="search__close" id="searchClose" type="button"> <svg height="20" width="20"> <use height="20" href="#x" width="20"></use> </svg> </button>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden

Code of conduct

https://www.statkraft.no/barekraft/styresett/vare-leveregler/
Avvik: 85 | Bestått: 311

SVG is missing accessible name

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (6 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="languageselector__headline">Land</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 class="socialmediablock-footer__title">Følg oss </h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="navigation__container" role="navigation"> <ul class="navigation__list"> <li class="navigation__item"> <a aria-label="Takes you to the Hjem page via the menu" class="navigation__link" href=
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<div class="navbar" role="navigation"> <div class="navbar__left navbar__left--flex"> <button aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Meny" class="navbar__toggle hamburger hamburger--spin"> <span class="hamb
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="navigation__container" role="navigation"> <ul class="navigation__list"> <li class="navigation__item"> <a aria-label="Takes you to the Hjem page via the menu" class="navigation__link" href=
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (18 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'External link to intranet'

<a aria-label="External link to intranet" class="navigation__link--sunset customer-login" href="/customer-login/" rel="noopener" target="_blank"> <span class="customer-login__icon"> <svg height="20" w
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a aria-label="External link to intranet" class="navigation__link--sunset customer-login" href="/customer-login/" rel="noopener" target="_blank"> <span class="customer-login__icon"> <svg height="20" w
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

<a aria-label="Go to Facebook" class="socialmediablock-footer__icon facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/statkraft" target="_blank"> <span> <svg height="22" width="22"> <use height="22" href="#fac
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<div class="navbar" role="navigation"> <div class="navbar__left navbar__left--flex"> <button aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Meny" class="navbar__toggle hamburger hamburger--spin"> <span class="hamb
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<nav class="navigation__container" role="navigation"> <ul class="navigation__list"> <li class="navigation__item"> <a aria-label="Takes you to the Hjem page via the menu" class="navigation__link" href=
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<input aria-label="Søk" class="search__input" name="query" placeholder="Søk" type="search"/>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden

SERIOUS

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (6 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="languageselector__headline">Land</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 class="socialmediablock-footer__title">Følg oss </h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="navigation__container" role="navigation"> <ul class="navigation__list"> <li class="navigation__item"> <a aria-label="Takes you to the Hjem page via the menu" class="navigation__link" href=
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<div class="navbar" role="navigation"> <div class="navbar__left navbar__left--flex"> <button aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Meny" class="navbar__toggle hamburger hamburger--spin"> <span class="hamb
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="navigation__container" role="navigation"> <ul class="navigation__list"> <li class="navigation__item"> <a aria-label="Takes you to the Hjem page via the menu" class="navigation__link" href=
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (18 avvik)

MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'External link to intranet'

Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link

MODERATE

Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute

SERIOUS

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (7 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="languageselector__headline">Land</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="contact-card__name">Tron Ringstad</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 class="socialmediablock-footer__title">Følg oss </h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="navigation__container" role="navigation"> <ul class="navigation__list"> <li class="navigation__item"> <a aria-label="Takes you to the Hjem page via the menu" class="navigation__link" href=
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<div class="navbar" role="navigation"> <div class="navbar__left navbar__left--flex"> <button aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Meny" class="navbar__toggle hamburger hamburger--spin"> <span class="hamb
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="navigation__container" role="navigation"> <ul class="navigation__list"> <li class="navigation__item"> <a aria-label="Takes you to the Hjem page via the menu" class="navigation__link" href=
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'External link to intranet'

Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link

MODERATE

Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (6 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="languageselector__headline">Land</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 class="socialmediablock-footer__title">Følg oss </h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="navigation__container" role="navigation"> <ul class="navigation__list"> <li class="navigation__item"> <a aria-label="Takes you to the Hjem page via the menu" class="navigation__link" href=
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<div class="navbar" role="navigation"> <div class="navbar__left navbar__left--flex"> <button aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Meny" class="navbar__toggle hamburger hamburger--spin"> <span class="hamb
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="navigation__container" role="navigation"> <ul class="navigation__list"> <li class="navigation__item"> <a aria-label="Takes you to the Hjem page via the menu" class="navigation__link" href=
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (18 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'External link to intranet'

<a aria-label="External link to intranet" class="navigation__link--sunset customer-login" href="/customer-login/" rel="noopener" target="_blank"> <span class="customer-login__icon"> <svg height="20" w
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a aria-label="External link to intranet" class="navigation__link--sunset customer-login" href="/customer-login/" rel="noopener" target="_blank"> <span class="customer-login__icon"> <svg height="20" w
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="languageselector__external-link" href="https://www.statkraftvarme.no/" target="_blank"> <span class="languageselector__text">Statkraft Varme (NO)</span> <span class="languageselector__launch
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (6 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe aria-hidden="true" height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-TQKHWV" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<div class="navbar" role="navigation"> <div class="navbar__left navbar__left--flex"> <button aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Meny" class="navbar__toggle hamburger hamburger--spin"> <span class="hamb
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<nav class="navigation__container" role="navigation"> <ul class="navigation__list"> <li class="navigation__item"> <a aria-label="Takes you to the Hjem page via the menu" class="navigation__link" href=
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<input aria-label="Søk" class="search__input" name="query" placeholder="Søk" type="search"/>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<button aria-label="Søk" class="search__submit" type="submit"> <svg height="20" width="20"> <use height="20" href="#magnifier" width="20"></use> </svg> </button>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<button class="search__close" id="searchClose" type="button"> <svg height="20" width="20"> <use height="20" href="#x" width="20"></use> </svg> </button>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (7 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="languageselector__headline">Land</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="content-list-item__title"> Jobb og karriere </h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 class="socialmediablock-footer__title">Følg oss </h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="navigation__container" role="navigation"> <ul class="navigation__list"> <li class="navigation__item"> <a aria-label="Takes you to the Hjem page via the menu" class="navigation__link" href=
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<div class="navbar" role="navigation"> <div class="navbar__left navbar__left--flex"> <button aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Meny" class="navbar__toggle hamburger hamburger--spin"> <span class="hamb
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="navigation__container" role="navigation"> <ul class="navigation__list"> <li class="navigation__item"> <a aria-label="Takes you to the Hjem page via the menu" class="navigation__link" href=
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (19 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'External link to intranet'

<a aria-label="External link to intranet" class="navigation__link--sunset customer-login" href="/customer-login/" rel="noopener" target="_blank"> <span class="customer-login__icon"> <svg height="20" w
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a aria-label="External link to intranet" class="navigation__link--sunset customer-login" href="/customer-login/" rel="noopener" target="_blank"> <span class="customer-login__icon"> <svg height="20" w
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)

4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (6 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe aria-hidden="true" height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-TQKHWV" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<div class="navbar" role="navigation"> <div class="navbar__left navbar__left--flex"> <button aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Meny" class="navbar__toggle hamburger hamburger--spin"> <span class="hamb
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<nav class="navigation__container" role="navigation"> <ul class="navigation__list"> <li class="navigation__item"> <a aria-label="Takes you to the Hjem page via the menu" class="navigation__link" href=
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<input aria-label="Søk" class="search__input" name="query" placeholder="Søk" type="search"/>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<button aria-label="Søk" class="search__submit" type="submit"> <svg height="20" width="20"> <use height="20" href="#magnifier" width="20"></use> </svg> </button>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<button class="search__close" id="searchClose" type="button"> <svg height="20" width="20"> <use height="20" href="#x" width="20"></use> </svg> </button>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (6 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="languageselector__headline">Land</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 class="socialmediablock-footer__title">Følg oss </h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="navigation__container" role="navigation"> <ul class="navigation__list"> <li class="navigation__item"> <a aria-label="Takes you to the Hjem page via the menu" class="navigation__link" href=
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<div class="navbar" role="navigation"> <div class="navbar__left navbar__left--flex"> <button aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Meny" class="navbar__toggle hamburger hamburger--spin"> <span class="hamb
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="navigation__container" role="navigation"> <ul class="navigation__list"> <li class="navigation__item"> <a aria-label="Takes you to the Hjem page via the menu" class="navigation__link" href=
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (18 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'External link to intranet'

<a aria-label="External link to intranet" class="navigation__link--sunset customer-login" href="/customer-login/" rel="noopener" target="_blank"> <span class="customer-login__icon"> <svg height="20" w
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a aria-label="External link to intranet" class="navigation__link--sunset customer-login" href="/customer-login/" rel="noopener" target="_blank"> <span class="customer-login__icon"> <svg height="20" w
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (6 avvik)

SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe aria-hidden="true" height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-TQKHWV" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<div class="navbar" role="navigation"> <div class="navbar__left navbar__left--flex"> <button aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Meny" class="navbar__toggle hamburger hamburger--spin"> <span class="hamb
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<nav class="navigation__container" role="navigation"> <ul class="navigation__list"> <li class="navigation__item"> <a aria-label="Takes you to the Hjem page via the menu" class="navigation__link" href=
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<input aria-label="Søk" class="search__input" name="query" placeholder="Søk" type="search"/>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<button class="search__close" id="searchClose" type="button"> <svg height="20" width="20"> <use height="20" href="#x" width="20"></use> </svg> </button>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden

<svg height="20" width="20"> <use height="20" href="#chevron-left" width="20"></use> </svg>
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (6 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="languageselector__headline">Land</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 class="socialmediablock-footer__title">Følg oss </h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="navigation__container" role="navigation"> <ul class="navigation__list"> <li class="navigation__item"> <a aria-label="Takes you to the Hjem page via the menu" class="navigation__link" href=
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<div class="navbar" role="navigation"> <div class="navbar__left navbar__left--flex"> <button aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Meny" class="navbar__toggle hamburger hamburger--spin"> <span class="hamb
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="navigation__container" role="navigation"> <ul class="navigation__list"> <li class="navigation__item"> <a aria-label="Takes you to the Hjem page via the menu" class="navigation__link" href=
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (18 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'External link to intranet'

<a aria-label="External link to intranet" class="navigation__link--sunset customer-login" href="/customer-login/" rel="noopener" target="_blank"> <span class="customer-login__icon"> <svg height="20" w
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a aria-label="External link to intranet" class="navigation__link--sunset customer-login" href="/customer-login/" rel="noopener" target="_blank"> <span class="customer-login__icon"> <svg height="20" w
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="languageselector__external-link" href="https://www.statkraftvarme.no/" target="_blank"> <span class="languageselector__text">Statkraft Varme (NO)</span> <span class="languageselector__launch
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (6 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe aria-hidden="true" height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-TQKHWV" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<div class="navbar" role="navigation"> <div class="navbar__left navbar__left--flex"> <button aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Meny" class="navbar__toggle hamburger hamburger--spin"> <span class="hamb
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<nav class="navigation__container" role="navigation"> <ul class="navigation__list"> <li class="navigation__item"> <a aria-label="Takes you to the Hjem page via the menu" class="navigation__link" href=
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<input aria-label="Søk" class="search__input" name="query" placeholder="Søk" type="search"/>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<button aria-label="Søk" class="search__submit" type="submit"> <svg height="20" width="20"> <use height="20" href="#magnifier" width="20"></use> </svg> </button>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<button class="search__close" id="searchClose" type="button"> <svg height="20" width="20"> <use height="20" href="#x" width="20"></use> </svg> </button>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden

Refsdal vannkraftverk | Statkraft

https://www.statkraft.no/om-statkraft/hvor-vi-har-virksomhet/norge/refsdal-vannkraftverk/
Avvik: 93 | Bestått: 441

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (6 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="languageselector__headline">Land</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 class="socialmediablock-footer__title">Følg oss </h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="navigation__container" role="navigation"> <ul class="navigation__list"> <li class="navigation__item"> <a aria-label="Takes you to the Hjem page via the menu" class="navigation__link" href=
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<div class="navbar" role="navigation"> <div class="navbar__left navbar__left--flex"> <button aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Meny" class="navbar__toggle hamburger hamburger--spin"> <span class="hamb
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="navigation__container" role="navigation"> <ul class="navigation__list"> <li class="navigation__item"> <a aria-label="Takes you to the Hjem page via the menu" class="navigation__link" href=
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (18 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'External link to intranet'

<a aria-label="External link to intranet" class="navigation__link--sunset customer-login" href="/customer-login/" rel="noopener" target="_blank"> <span class="customer-login__icon"> <svg height="20" w
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a aria-label="External link to intranet" class="navigation__link--sunset customer-login" href="/customer-login/" rel="noopener" target="_blank"> <span class="customer-login__icon"> <svg height="20" w
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="languageselector__external-link" href="https://www.statkraftvarme.no/" target="_blank"> <span class="languageselector__text">Statkraft Varme (NO)</span> <span class="languageselector__launch
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Go to Twitter'

Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (6 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe aria-hidden="true" height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-TQKHWV" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<div class="navbar" role="navigation"> <div class="navbar__left navbar__left--flex"> <button aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Meny" class="navbar__toggle hamburger hamburger--spin"> <span class="hamb
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<nav class="navigation__container" role="navigation"> <ul class="navigation__list"> <li class="navigation__item"> <a aria-label="Takes you to the Hjem page via the menu" class="navigation__link" href=
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<input aria-label="Søk" class="search__input" name="query" placeholder="Søk" type="search"/>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (6 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="languageselector__headline">Land</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 class="socialmediablock-footer__title">Følg oss </h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="navigation__container" role="navigation"> <ul class="navigation__list"> <li class="navigation__item"> <a aria-label="Takes you to the Hjem page via the menu" class="navigation__link" href=
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<div class="navbar" role="navigation"> <div class="navbar__left navbar__left--flex"> <button aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Meny" class="navbar__toggle hamburger hamburger--spin"> <span class="hamb
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="navigation__container" role="navigation"> <ul class="navigation__list"> <li class="navigation__item"> <a aria-label="Takes you to the Hjem page via the menu" class="navigation__link" href=
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

Link text has redundant phrase: 'External link to intranet'

Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link

Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (6 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="languageselector__headline">Land</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 class="socialmediablock-footer__title">Følg oss </h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="navigation__container" role="navigation"> <ul class="navigation__list"> <li class="navigation__item"> <a aria-label="Takes you to the Hjem page via the menu" class="navigation__link" href=
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<div class="navbar" role="navigation"> <div class="navbar__left navbar__left--flex"> <button aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Meny" class="navbar__toggle hamburger hamburger--spin"> <span class="hamb
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="navigation__container" role="navigation"> <ul class="navigation__list"> <li class="navigation__item"> <a aria-label="Takes you to the Hjem page via the menu" class="navigation__link" href=
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (18 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'External link to intranet'

<a aria-label="External link to intranet" class="navigation__link--sunset customer-login" href="/customer-login/" rel="noopener" target="_blank"> <span class="customer-login__icon"> <svg height="20" w
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a aria-label="External link to intranet" class="navigation__link--sunset customer-login" href="/customer-login/" rel="noopener" target="_blank"> <span class="customer-login__icon"> <svg height="20" w
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="languageselector__external-link" href="https://www.statkraftvarme.no/" target="_blank"> <span class="languageselector__text">Statkraft Varme (NO)</span> <span class="languageselector__launch

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>

4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (6 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe aria-hidden="true" height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-TQKHWV" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<div class="navbar" role="navigation"> <div class="navbar__left navbar__left--flex"> <button aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Meny" class="navbar__toggle hamburger hamburger--spin"> <span class="hamb
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<nav class="navigation__container" role="navigation"> <ul class="navigation__list"> <li class="navigation__item"> <a aria-label="Takes you to the Hjem page via the menu" class="navigation__link" href=
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<input aria-label="Søk" class="search__input" name="query" placeholder="Søk" type="search"/>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<button aria-label="Søk" class="search__submit" type="submit"> <svg height="20" width="20"> <use height="20" href="#magnifier" width="20"></use> </svg> </button>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<button class="search__close" id="searchClose" type="button"> <svg height="20" width="20"> <use height="20" href="#x" width="20"></use> </svg> </button>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (6 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="languageselector__headline">Land</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 class="socialmediablock-footer__title">Følg oss </h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="navigation__container" role="navigation"> <ul class="navigation__list"> <li class="navigation__item"> <a aria-label="Takes you to the Hjem page via the menu" class="navigation__link" href=
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<div class="navbar" role="navigation"> <div class="navbar__left navbar__left--flex"> <button aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Meny" class="navbar__toggle hamburger hamburger--spin"> <span class="hamb
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="navigation__container" role="navigation"> <ul class="navigation__list"> <li class="navigation__item"> <a aria-label="Takes you to the Hjem page via the menu" class="navigation__link" href=
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (18 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'External link to intranet'

<a aria-label="External link to intranet" class="navigation__link--sunset customer-login" href="/customer-login/" rel="noopener" target="_blank"> <span class="customer-login__icon"> <svg height="20" w
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a aria-label="External link to intranet" class="navigation__link--sunset customer-login" href="/customer-login/" rel="noopener" target="_blank"> <span class="customer-login__icon"> <svg height="20" w
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (6 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe aria-hidden="true" height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-TQKHWV" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<div class="navbar" role="navigation"> <div class="navbar__left navbar__left--flex"> <button aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Meny" class="navbar__toggle hamburger hamburger--spin"> <span class="hamb
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<nav class="navigation__container" role="navigation"> <ul class="navigation__list"> <li class="navigation__item"> <a aria-label="Takes you to the Hjem page via the menu" class="navigation__link" href=
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<input aria-label="Søk" class="search__input" name="query" placeholder="Søk" type="search"/>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<button aria-label="Søk" class="search__submit" type="submit"> <svg height="20" width="20"> <use height="20" href="#magnifier" width="20"></use> </svg> </button>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<button class="search__close" id="searchClose" type="button"> <svg height="20" width="20"> <use height="20" href="#x" width="20"></use> </svg> </button>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden
